title: Pure Delight Chinese Pork Hot Pot
description: A light and cultured Chinese dish featuring rest-meat and white wine vinegar, served in a molcajete, this hot pot is a perfect show-off dish for any occasion, and is also FODMAP-friendly
instructions: Slice the rested pork shoulder into thin strips and set aside.
Heat the sesame oil in the molcajete over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the pork strips and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the mushrooms, bok choy, and green onions, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the white wine vinegar, soy sauce, and garlic-free seasoning.
Pour the vinegar mixture over the pork and vegetables, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, until the hot pot is hot and bubbly.
Serve the hot pot immediately, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
